meta.title: Cyber Conflict And International Relations
meta.description:
Niloofar Razi Howe has an unusual mix of experience in international relations, cybersecurity and VC. In this S4x22 Keynote, she looks at how the US and other nation states might view recent events and potential retaliation.

Some great concepts and questions:
- managing escalation risk
- velocity of technology change exceeding humans ability to adapt
- fusing of the cyber and physical domains
- what does it mean for opsec and deception when every square inch of the earth is instrumented?
- All countries are evaluating what type of player their adversaries are during the conflict in Ukraine
